zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth FitzAlan於1320年出生在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel35歲，母親Alice de Warenne33歲。她於1353年8月10日之前與William Latimer 4th Baron結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1384年3月11日在英國英格蘭享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth FitzAlan于1320年出生在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel35岁，母亲Alice de Warenne33岁。她于1353年8月10日之前与William Latimer 4th Baron结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1384年3月11日在英国英格兰享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth FitzAlan was born in 1320, in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, was 35 and her mother, Alice de Warenne, was 33. She married William Latimer 4th Baron before 10 August 1353. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 11 March 1384, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth FitzAlan est née en 1320, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice de Warenne, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Latimer 4th Baron avant 10 août 1353. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 mars 1384, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth FitzAlan 1320 in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel 35 und ihre Mutter Alice de Warenne 33. Sie hat vor 10. August 1353 William Latimer 4th Baron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. März 1384 im Alter von 64 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzAlan è nata il nel 1320 nel Arundel, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice de Warenne, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William Latimer 4th Baron prima del 10 agosto 1353. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 11 marzo 1384, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzAlanが1320年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundelは35歳，母Alice de Warenneは33歳であった。1353年8月10日以前にWilliam Latimer 4th Baronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1384年3月11日にイギリスイギリスで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzAlan(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Warenne(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1353년 8월 10일 이전 William Latimer 4th Baron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 3월 11일 영국 잉글랜드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzAlan nasceu em 1320, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Warenne, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William Latimer 4th Baron antes 10 de agosto de 1353. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de março de 1384, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth FitzAlan родилась в 1320 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Warenne, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Latimer 4th Baron перед 10 августа 1353 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 марта 1384 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth FitzAlan nació en 1320, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice de Warenne, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William Latimer 4th Baron antes de 10 de agosto de 1353. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1384, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
